entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange preserved in current DEX and protocol registries, with insufficient recent public activity evidence for a full active classification.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves AlphaQ as a Solana DEX. Strong recent utilization and a stable first-party application surface were not recovered in this review pass. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead and leaves original URL fields unknown.

evidence.title: AlphaQ DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Current DEX discovery data identifies AlphaQ as a Solana decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: AlphaQ protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile preserves the AlphaQ identity without by itself proving strong recent utilization.

evidence.title: AlphaQ protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Protocol data supports a limited classification because the exchange identity remains while stronger recent activity evidence was not recovered.
